title: Review
text: Using it for just a day & I realised it as Third class discount broker services!! Very poor! A lot of hidden charges while Equity Buy & sell that do not show during transactions but later deducted. Around ₹20 DP charges + Brokerage extra while Selling (While Zerodha only charges fixed ₹15.34 DP charges； no other charges). You can't withdraw funds after selling. You've to wait a day to withdraw funds (while Zerodha； instant credit after sell & instant withdrawal)
